textByHashes.8a64d5e46d694eab2871192423e5d5d0301b6ea3: Sorry, but you need to be a better hunter before we can help you out.
textByHashes.394873731ec13e30473328038edb9a7e16e2334a: Oh, you're a new face around here, aren't you?
textByHashes.82c3770ff0c39d4746716d8308453b430e321624: Well, I'm Apatura. Let me welcome you to our small corner of Varlamore.
textByHashes.f86e6647a3715daf675fc1598e33d9dbc7976355: We're mostly here to keep an eye on the local animal populations, and provide animal parts to the city.
textByHashes.aa7b199b3adde60412d3bf0dfeab74a5ec31087c: As for me personally, I'm the current master of this guild.
textByHashes.685f07da5315281f686b65b3266d886b72390ef6: A hunter's work is dangerous. We tend to go through members faster than other guilds. That said, I'm usually too busy with politics and paperwork to go out hunting these days.
textByHashes.3b6057ce4d5da1cdcf0819e1bf120ae57ab6bf2b: Absolutely! There's always more work to be done. Head down into the Burrow and talk to the other hunters to get an idea of what we need help with.
textByHashes.3b488afec1ecf0af876b88fd10c45858da4b353c: I'm not sure if you have the time or the patience, iknami, but a little birdy told me that our esteemed scribe Verity may require some assistance.
textByHashes.10871cc4ea17ad39bd070e0c4d3e0999a653ecca: If I had to guess, she needs someone to find something for her.
textByHashes.7feaf89410c678684ad1508f0992c3b5e65ca7d9: She's a wonderful scribe, but can lose some strange things here and there.
textByHashes.81506d4a1c96a4cbacfa5164735ccc0f06676916: She's behind the bar in the Burrow. Just look for the stressed woman trying to wrangle a bunch of barely- bathed hunters.
textByHashes.40c5889480701cd5ceb3c54e0e91ffad3422739b: Tetamo... Well, hopefully it's not too important.
textByHashes.8dd0bb032a8b9fff0e93cdd58789d9b701cdeb31: Absolutely. Have you spoken to Verity yet?
textByHashes.b1f697f8087f863792e13c9c97a1e6e9d2a2757b: If you're having a hard time finding her, she's behind the bar in the Burrow. Head down the stairs in the big tree. You can't miss it, and if you can, maybe you're not cut out for the Hunter Guild.
textByHashes.32a2dbd2d564085ee1ed8747c122a4edd765b396: Absolutely. So was our little birdy right about Verity needing a hand?
textByHashes.f3ffd5b93c3ab3981f74df3c9083dbac2d5a1eb8: Of course not. Only Pitri talks to the birds.
textByHashes.000e4e3534d10d4b10dcd35cedb9e212e230f820: Ha, that certainly sounds like Fox! What errand has Wolf got him running this time?
textByHashes.02f95a9ad8ebbfa0a9b94eccfd65ba05b4263508: Let's just say you don't run things around here without good instincts. Let me guess - it's also got something to do with Kiko.
textByHashes.6e07ecf9ffa20ebc450951b549af08c15d33c22d: It's an open secret how much Fox and Wolf care about that cat. We all do of course, but those two don't half spoil him rotten.
textByHashes.32ac3c1c873354a14e690b6738af5f52dbf5894d: Well, that is impressive. How has he managed that?
textByHashes.3c5fd66bb50788e4e149677895885597fdab70d2: Well as you're not offering your condolences, I can only assume he's survived the encounter?
textByHashes.d5fef15414a70190985217a8b0d47da4b7cfdeab: Excellent. A final question - was his hand injured?
textByHashes.0e81560d47f9d6df901d8a7ad18c1ec4937703de: Wonderful! Then I look foward to reading his report.
textByHashes.099297e1d184dece22a54e1b9138f58a99dd0316: Kuani! So what was so important for our darling Kiko that poor Fox risked life and limb?
textByHashes.32bcf89cfd76cbd8c8cffc4bca5db460562d7cbd: Actually... I think I'll just read the report.
textByHashes.d8270f5a13d588d2ba61fa912a812546fdf0f92c: I see you've been doing a lot of work for the guild of late. Would you like to learn a bit more about our history?
textByHashes.a2d014bfb877baa7ec1c63cf4b7e62bbeee57c94: Here's a little snippet about our original construction, from right back when we were first established.
textByHashes.e6029ffb1327d11aa938a0517b052480b9fc561b: Alright. You can grab it from my bookshelf upstairs whenever you want to read it.
textByHashes.6cc12bcb793afe8db3dd1a93fcfcaf6105083edb: Your commitment to helping our guild is commendable, iknami.
textByHashes.46009a15fdb8fa5a25f725d5ed19fe434cbea5fb: If you want to learn about our history, I have a document here you can read if you'd like.
textByHashes.a5b9e8460b2dbdbf413fd769b4dbfc0415ea99ab: You can take it from my shelves when you're ready to read it. Just head up that ladder over there.
textByHashes.5988dc83cd63a7225b8c55dea334ac4b05b56f41: You have proven yourself a true ally of our guild, iknami.
textByHashes.f1b542c7c333c6ac6b69afe99da0e11592df7691: As a personal reward for your help, you can have this key to open the chest on the floor above.
textByHashes.b7ace1d9fd56c492e60c84b34defeb7108f3bb02: Is that a skillcape you have with you?
textByHashes.a1f20431dddce648a9f4dcdaf4b548bd06c79c20: Would you like me to enhance it with the ability to teleport directly to the guild?
textByHashes.4ee596378b846ebd66a7e2800709987cbc0e3be1: Kuani! That should be done for you now.
